pages.text: A Froglight is what a frog drops when it eats its matching slime. Each one is stamped with its resource, so iron Froglights and copper Froglights stay separate even though they share a block.

Smelt a Froglight for a copy of its resource - that is how the farm becomes materials. A frog's Bounty stat sets how many drop per slime, so breeding up Bounty multiplies the yield.$(br2)A Froglight is also a full-bright decorative block (light level 15). Place it as tinted lighting if you would rather show it off than smelt it.
